source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: My name is Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: And that is my little brother George

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: That is Mrs. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: That is Mr. Pig

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: I am Peppa

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2
cards.english: [Windmill Castle]

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: tung4 uk1 kei5 jan4 zeon2 bei6 ceot1 heoi3 waan2
cards.english: Peppa and her family are getting ready to go out and play

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 今日，我哋會去風之城堡啊
cards.jyutping: gam1 jat6 ngo5 dei6 wui6 heoi3 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 aa3
cards.english: Today, we are going to Windmill Castle

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: me1 hai6 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: What is the Windy Castle, Daddy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 佢係一座起喺高山上面嘅城堡
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 jat1 zo6 hei2 hai2 gou1 saan1 soeng6 min6 ge3 sing4 bou2
cards.english: It's a castle built on top of a high mountain.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: zung1 ji3 sing4 bou2
cards.english: George likes castles.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 風之城堡聽落似係畀男仔玩嘅無聊地方啊
cards.jyutping: fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 ting1 lok6 ci5 hai6 bei2 naam4 zai2 waan2 ge3 mou4 liu4 dei6 fong1 aa3
cards.english: The Windy Castle sounds like a boring place for boys.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 gaa4 nei5 sat6 zung1 ji3 gaa4
cards.english: No, Peppa, you'll definitely like it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 喺城堡頂部望出去嘅風景好靚㗎
cards.jyutping: hai2 sing4 bou2 ding2 bou6 mong6 ceot1 heoi3 ge3 fung1 ging2 hou2 leng3 gaa4
cards.english: The view from the top of the castle is very beautiful.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 你可以見到爺爺嫲嫲間屋𠻹
cards.jyutping: nei5 ho2 ji5 gin3 dou2 je4 je2 maa4 maa4 gaan1 uk1 tim1
cards.english: You can even see Grandpa and Grandma's house.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: heoi3 laa3
cards.english: Wow, let's go!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我嚟睇地圖，而媽咪就負責揸車
cards.jyutping: ngo5 lai4 tai2 dei6 tou4 ji4 maa1 mi4 zau6 fu6 zaak3 zaa1 ce1
cards.english: I'll look at the map, and Mummy will be in charge of driving.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 jiu3 gam2 zou6 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Do you really have to do that, Daddy?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 你次次睇地圖都搞到我蕩失路，你又忟憎
cards.jyutping: nei5 ci3 ci3 tai2 dei6 tou4 dou1 gaau2 dou3 ngo5 dong6 sat1 lou6 nei5 jau6 mang2 zang2
cards.english: Every time you look at the map, you get me lost, and then you get annoyed.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我哋唔會蕩失路𠸏，而我亦唔會發忟憎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 m4 wui6 dong6 sat1 lou6 ge2 ji4 ngo5 jik6 m4 wui6 faat3 mang2 zang2
cards.english: We won't get lost, and I won't get annoyed either.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 ngo5 dei6 lai4 laa1
cards.english: Wind Castle, here we come!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 zung6 mei6 heoi3 dou3 aa1
cards.english: Are we there yet?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: mei6 heoi3 dou3 aa3
cards.english: Not there yet.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: juk1
cards.english: Oh...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: nei5 soeng2 waan2 go3 jau4 hei3 maa1
cards.english: Do you want to play a game?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3 de1 dei6
cards.english: Okay, Dad.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 waan2 ngaan5 luk1 luk1 aa1
cards.english: Let's play 'staring contest'.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: o1 ke1 jau5 ngo5 waan2 sin1 laa1
cards.english: OK, let me play first.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 豬先生好秘密噉望住一樣嘢
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 hou2 bei3 mat6 gam2 mong6 zyu6 jat1 joeng6 je5
cards.english: Mr. Pig is secretly looking at something.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 其他人就估佢喺度望緊啲咩嘞
cards.jyutping: kei4 taa1 jan4 zau6 gu2 keoi5 hai2 dou6 mong6 gan2 di1 me1 laak3
cards.english: The others are guessing what he's looking at.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我對眼望到嘅嘢，而佢嘅顏色係紅色
cards.jyutping: ngo5 deoi3 ngaan5 mong6 dou3 ge3 je5 ji4 keoi5 ge3 ngaan4 sik1 hai6 hung4 sik1
cards.english: The thing I see, and its color is red.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: hung4 sik1
cards.english: Red?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 tiu4 kwan4 keoi5 hai6 hung4 sik1 gaa4
cards.english: My dress, it's red.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: co3 laa3 m4 hai6 nei5 tiu4 kwan4 aa3
cards.english: Wrong, it's not your dress.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: hai6 gaa3 ce1
cards.english: It's the car.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 你估啱咗喇，係我哋架紅色車啊
cards.jyutping: nei5 gu2 ngaam1 zo2 laa3 hai6 ngo5 dei6 gaa3 hung4 sik1 ce1 aa3
cards.english: You guessed it, it's our red car.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: dou3 ngo5 ngo5 dei6 ngaan5 mong6 dou3 ge3 je5
cards.english: My turn, the thing we see.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 ge3 ngaan4 sik1 hai6 laam4 sik1
cards.english: Its color is blue.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: gin6 laam4 sik1 saam1
cards.english: George's blue shirt?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: m4 ngaam1
cards.english: No, that's wrong.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 呢樣嘢係咪喺架車入面㗎？
cards.jyutping: nei4 joeng6 je5 hai6 mai6 hai2 gaa3 ce1 jap6 min6 gaa4
cards.english: Is this thing inside the car?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: m4 hai6 hei3 kyun4 mei6
cards.english: No, are you giving up yet?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: hei3 kyun4
cards.english: Giving up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: hai6 tin1 hung1 aa3 laam4 sik1 ge3 tin1 hung1
cards.english: It's the sky, the blue sky.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jeng4 zo2
cards.english: I won.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 爹哋呀，你知道我哋喺邊度咩啊？
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa1 nei5 zi1 dou3 ngo5 dei6 hai2 bin1 dou6 me1 aa3
cards.english: Daddy, do you know where we are?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我梗係知道我哋喺邊啦
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gang2 hai6 zi1 dou3 ngo5 dei6 hai2 bin1 laa1
cards.english: Of course I know where we are.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3
cards.english: But...

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 呢條路睇嚟唔多似係地圖上面條路噉喎
cards.jyutping: ne1 tiu4 lou6 tai2 lai4 m4 do1 ci5 hai6 dei6 tou4 soeng6 min6 tiu4 lou6 gam2 wo3
cards.english: This road doesn't look like the road on the map.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: de1 dei6 aa3 ngo5 dei6 dong6 sat1 lou6 laa3
cards.english: Dad, we're lost.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 mou5 dong6 sat1 lou6 aa3
cards.english: We're not lost.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 噉由呢一度點先去到風之城堡吖？
cards.jyutping: gam2 jau4 ne1 jat1 dou6 dim2 sin1 heoi3 dou3 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 aa1
cards.english: Then how do we get to Wind Castle from here?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: nei5 bei2 di1 si4 gaan3 ngo5 aa1
cards.english: Give me some time.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 得喇，可以打電話畀爺爺嫲嫲
cards.jyutping: dak1 laa3 ho2 ji5 daa2 din6 waa2 bei2 je4 je2 maa4 maa4
cards.english: Okay, we can call Grandpa and Grandma.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我哋根本就冇必要打電話畀佢哋
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 gan1 bun2 zau6 mou5 bit1 jiu3 daa2 din6 waa2 bei2 keoi5 dei6
cards.english: We don't need to call them at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 就算要用成日時間，我都會帶你哋去
cards.jyutping: zau6 syun3 jiu3 jung6 seng4 yat6 si4 gaan3 ngo5 dou1 wui6 daai3 nei5 dei6 heoi3
cards.english: Even if it takes all day, I'll take you there.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 但係我哋冇咁多時間啊
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 ngo5 dei6 mou5 gam3 do1 si4 gaan3 aa3
cards.english: But we don't have that much time.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 你好啊，我係豬爺爺啊，邊位啊？
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa3 ngo5 hai6 zyu1 je4 je4 aa3 bin1 wai2 aa3
cards.english: Hello, this is Grandpa Pig, who is this?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: zyu1 je4 je4 aa1
cards.english: It's Grandpa Pig.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我哋想去風之城堡，但係蕩失咗路啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 soeng2 heoi3 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 daan6 hai6 dong6 sat1 zo2 lou6 aa3
cards.english: We want to go to Wind Castle, but we're lost.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 又係豬先生負責睇地圖啦，係咪啊？
cards.jyutping: jau6 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1 fu6 zaak3 tai2 dei6 tou4 laa1 hai6 mai6 aa3
cards.english: Mr. Pig is responsible for reading the map again, isn't he?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 係啊，的確係佢負責睇地圖
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 dik1 kok3 hai6 keoi5 fu6 zaak3 tai2 dei6 tou4
cards.english: Yes, he is indeed responsible for reading the map.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 ji4 gaa1 zung6 jau5 di1 man4 zang1 tim1 aa3
cards.english: And he's still a little annoyed right now.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 jat1 di1 dou1 m4 man4 zang1
cards.english: I'm not annoyed at all.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: gam2 ngo5 gaau3 nei5 dei6 hang4 laa1
cards.english: Then I'll tell you how to go.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: jat1 zik6 jyun4 zyu6 daai6 lou6 hong6
cards.english: Just keep going along the main road.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 直到你見到風之城堡噉就到㗎喇
cards.jyutping: zik6 dou3 nei5 gin3 dou2 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 gam2 zau6 dou3 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Until you see Wind Castle, then you've arrived.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 m4 goi1 saai3 nei5 aa3
cards.english: Thank you so much.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我哋沿住大路行應該會見到嗰座城堡
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jyun4 zyu6 daai6 lou6 hong6 jing1 goi1 wui6 gin3 dou2 go2 zo6 sing4 bou2
cards.english: If we follow the main road, we should see the castle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dou1 hai6 gam2 nam2 aa3
cards.english: I think so too.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 hai6 mai6 zau6 hai6 go2 zo6 aa3
cards.english: Look, is that it?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: hai6 aa3 hai6 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 aa3
cards.english: Yes, it's Wind Castle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ce1 ce1 gaa1 jau2
cards.english: Chee Chee, keep it up.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ce1 ce1 gaa1 jau2 nei5 jat1 ding6 dak1 gaa4
cards.english: Chee Chee, keep it up, you can do it.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: hou2 je5 hou2 je5
cards.english: -Yay! -Yay!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: Peppa同屋企人到咗風之城堡喇
cards.jyutping: tung4 uk1 kei5 jan4 dou3 zo2 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 laa3
cards.english: Peppa and her family have arrived at Wind Castle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: keoi5 hou2 gou1 aa3
cards.english: Wow, it's so tall.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我哋入去啦，上面望出去嘅風景好靚㗎
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jap6 heoi3 laa1 soeng6 min6 mong6 ceot1 heoi3 ge3 fung1 ging2 hou2 leng3 gaa4
cards.english: Let's go in, the view from the top is beautiful.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 di1 fung1 ging2 aa1
cards.english: Let's look at the scenery.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 媽咪，嗰間係咪爺爺嫲嫲間屋啊？
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 go2 haan4 hai6 mai6 je4 je2 maa4 maa4 gaan1 uk1 aa3
cards.english: Mommy, is that Grandpa and Grandma's house?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: mou5 co3 hai6 aa3
cards.english: That's right, it is.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: gaan1 uk1 hai2 hou2 jyun5 aa3
cards.english: The house is very far away.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 我哋用呢個望遠鏡睇下吖
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 jung6 ni1 go3 mong6 jyun5 geng3 tai2 haa6 aa1
cards.english: Let's use this telescope to take a look.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 bei2 ngo5 tai2 sin1 maa1
cards.english: Can I look first?

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 可以，但你一陣要畀George睇㗎
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 daan6 nei5 jat1 zan6 jiu3 bei2 tai2 gaa4
cards.english: Yes, but you have to let George look in a little while.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 望遠鏡令遠嘅嘢睇落大啲
cards.jyutping: mong6 jyun5 geng3 ling6 jyun5 ge3 je5 tai2 lok6 daai6 di1
cards.english: The telescope makes things that are far away look bigger.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 gin3 dou2 je4 je2 tung4 maa4 maa4 aa3
cards.english: I see Grandpa and Grandma!

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: nei5 tai2 haa6
cards.english: Take a look, George.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: maa4 maa4 je4 je2
cards.english: Grandma, Grandpa.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: George喺度同豬爺爺同豬嫲嫲揮手啊
cards.jyutping: hai2 dou6 tung4 zyu1 je4 je2 tung4 zyu1 maa4 maa4 fai1 sau2 aa3
cards.english: George is waving at Grandpa Pig and Grandma Pig here.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 so4 aa3
cards.english: George is really silly.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 爺爺同埋嫲嫲冇可能見到你喺度揮手㗎
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 tung4 maai4 maa4 maa4 mou5 ho2 nang4 gin3 dou2 nei5 hai2 dou6 fai1 sau2 gaa4
cards.english: Grandma and Grandpa couldn't possibly see you waving there.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: hai6 laa3 daa2 bei2 keoi5 dei6 aa1
cards.english: That's right, call them.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: nei5 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Hello.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 爺爺啊，我哋喺風之城堡上面見到你啊
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 aa3 ngo5 dei6 hai2 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 soeng6 min6 gin3 dou2 nei5 aa3
cards.english: Grandpa, we saw you on Wind Castle.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: tung4 ngo5 dei6 fai1 sau2 aa1
cards.english: Wave to us.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.characters: 爺爺同嫲嫲喺度同我哋揮手啊
cards.jyutping: je4 je2 tung4 maa4 maa4 hai2 dou6 tung4 ngo5 dei6 fai1 sau2 aa3
cards.english: Grandpa and Grandma are waving to us.

cards.source: Peppa Pig Cantonese 粵語 - S1E27 Windy Castle［風之城堡］
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zung1 ji3 fung1 zi1 sing4 bou2 aa3
cards.english: I like Wind Castle.
